title: Savory Crunch Italian Romano Pepper Crumble
description: A salty, flaky crowd-pleaser featuring Romano pepper and slow-cooked to perfection, making it a delightful side dish or snack.

ingredients.name: Romano cheese
ingredients.notes: Freshly grated Romano for best flavor

ingredients.name: Coarse sea salt
ingredients.notes: For added crunch and savory depth

ingredients.name: Panko breadcrumbs
ingredients.notes: Optional, omit if nut-free is required

ingredients.name: Freshly ground black pepper
ingredients.notes: For a slight peppery kick without overpowering the Romano

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine crumbled Romano cheese with coarse sea salt and freshly ground black pepper.
If using Panko breadcrumbs, add them into the mixture for extra texture. Mix well until fully combined.
Transfer the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or silicone mat to prevent sticking.
Bake in the preheated oven for about 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from oven and let it cool down slightly before serving. It's best served warm.
